content_body: All we can say is "Fabulous." This is our sixth year staying in one of Gary's cabins and as always we are never disappointed! We went hiking, tubing, whitewater rafting, and zip-lining (in Lula, GA). Spent a day in Blue Ridge - we just adore that little town and ate at some of the local hang outs. The cool evenings were a wonderful gift being from hot, humid Florida. We enjoyed each morning on the porch - what wonderful music the birds sing! We enjoyed every moment of our trip. Can't wait to return!
title: Fabulous Getaway with Cabin Rentals of Georgia
